title: Widen Root-Pack Schema Catalog Contract
summary: Updates reusable-core schema catalog validation so first-party root packs can publish canonical schema paths under <pack>/.wt/schemas/.
scope_items: Update the schema catalog artifact contract for supported first-party root packs.
Keep the rule donor-neutral and constrained to supported pack machine roots.
done_when_items: A first-party root pack schema catalog path such as oversight/.wt/schemas/... validates under reusable core.
Unsupported non-pack roots still fail the schema catalog artifact contract.
